Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Feature

The class contains information about available feature and sub-features

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Name

The feature name.

 string

None.
Url

Url to the itslearning web page for the feature if it exists.

 string

None.
Features

The list of sub-features.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Feature
